Verified Statement Of Interest And Petition For Order Approving Assignment Of Interests In Estate And Authorizing Distribution Directly To Celtic Research
Off Calendar Jul-15-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Rueppel appeared by zoom for American Reserach Bureau.
Debbie Jones appeared by zoom for Alliance Estate Research and Celtic Research.
Patricia Fyfe appeared by courtcall for Jose Barrientos.

No one objects to the Verified Statement of Interest and Petition for Order Approving Assignment of Interests in Estate and Authorizing Distribution Directly to Celtic Research. Said petition is under submission with the court's intent to grant. The court proposed continuing the accounting petition for one month to get the final issues that were raised in the probate examiner's notes worked through, and stated that what was filed cleared up some of the issues, but not all of them. The revised First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is continued to August 12, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Tan. Not reported.

Off Calendar Oct-16-2023 Continued To Dec-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Debbie Jones appeared by zoom for Celtic Research.
Azita Rahim appeared by zoom for Baudilio Fuentes and Inez Fuentes (heirs at law).
Patricia Fyfe appeared by zoom for Jose Barrientos (administrator).

The court referred to the verified statement of interest/petition regarding the request to keep it on hold until the estate is closed. Mrs. Fyfe stated that they finally got the accounting done, that there was a problem with the bank in getting the statements, that it took a long time and that they can get it filed in the very near future. Status on close of the estate, and the Verified Statement of Interest, etc. are continued to December 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court informed Mrs. Fyfe that if the estate is not ready to be closed, she needs to file a petition for approval of a report on status of administration.
Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petitioners Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Apr-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patricia Fyfe appeared by zoom for petitioner.
Azita Rahim appeared by zoom for Baudilio Fuentes and Ines Fuentes (heirs at law).
Debbie Jones appeared by zoom for Celtic Research and Alliance Estate Research.

There being no objections, the Court granted the Amended Petition to Determine Heirship (order signed in open court). Mrs. Fyfe requested six months, stating that now that the petition is granted, she can get ready to close the estate. Status on close of estate is continued to October 16, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Third Amended Petition
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Off Calendar

Petitioners Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Jan-23-2023 Continued To Feb-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom: Patricia K. Fyfe, Esq. for Jose Barrientos (Petitioner). Debbie Jones, Esq. for Celtic Research (Requestor) and Alliance Estate Research. Azita Rahim, Esq. for Baudilio Fuentes and Ines Fuentes (Heirs-at-Law).

The Court stated that there has been no progress since the last calling of the matter, that it had wanted to take this petition off calendar, and that the petition was not taken off calendar because the Court was told that an amended petition was to be filed. Ms. Fyfe presented a brief update stating there is a petition ready to be filed, that her client was out of town, and that the petition should be filed this week. Ms. Fyfe also stated that she would be filing a third ammended petition, that she does not have the exact title today, that there was a mistake on one of the pages which has been corrected, and that it just requires her client's signature. Ms. Jones stated that she's seen the petition and that her clients are in support of the filing.

Petitioner's Petition to Determine Heirship is continued to February 27, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Status on the filing of a third amended petition is also set for February 27, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.

Petitioners Petition To Determine Heirship
Off Calendar Oct-17-2022 Continued To Jan-23-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patricia K. Fyfe, via Zoom, for Jose Barrientos, Personal Representative; Azita Rahim, via Zoom, for Baudillo Fuentes and Ines Fuentes, Interested Parties; Debbie Jones, via Zoom, for Celtic Research, Ltd., Requestor.

The court advises that since this matter appears to have stalled, its tentative ruling is to take the petition off calendar and that it can be re-filed once it's ready to proceed. Ms. Fyfe reports of continuing to work on clearing the probate Examiner's notes and hopes to have a petition filed soon and asks for an additional continuance accordingly. Ms. Rahim and Jones agree with Ms. Fyfe's request.

The Petition is continued to Jan-23-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (588 - 12th Ave, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar May-18-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patricia Fyfe, via ZOOM, counsel for Jose Barrientos, Administrator; Terri Popkes, via ZOOM, counsel for Celtic Research, Ltd., Requestor.

At the onset, the court queries Ms. Fyfe as to her objective for filing a Report of Sale when her client has been appointed Administrator of the Estate with full IAEA authority, which would allow him to sell the property without having filed the Report of Sale. Ms. Fyfe reports that she thought that by filing the Report of Sale, she anticipated that several overbids would be received. She then reports that the appraisal of the property had been too high. The court then advises Ms. Fyfe that there are several issues with the Report of Sale and that the sale cannot be confirmed at this time. The court also advises Ms. Fyfe to research the probate code in order to determine what the best option is for her client moving forward.

The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-23-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Patricia Fyfe appeared by telephone for and with Jose Barrientos by telephone.
Debbie Jones appeared by zoom for Celtic Research.

The Court noted that Mr. Lazar was not present, stated that identification of heirs, or potential heirs seems like a fluid process in this matter, that some folks have been recently discovered, but there are others who reportedly have not been located and that it waives notice for this petition only as to them. Ms. Fyfe and Ms. Jones stated that they have no objections to the Court waiving notice. The Court informed Ms. Fyfe that she will have to file a petition to determine heirship promptly. The Court also stated that it will grant the appointment of Mr. Barrientos as the Administrator with full authority and bond set at $1,700,000.00. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for January 19, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of estate is set for March 15, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.
